title: Build a foundation to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot
summary: Prepare to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot using Copilot Studio, Microsoft Foundry, Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit, and more. Explore agent use cases, development paths, tools, and related considerations.

sections.title: Build a foundation to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot
sections.summary: Prepare to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot using Copilot Studio, Microsoft Foundry, Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit, and more. Explore agent use cases, development paths, tools, and related considerations.

lessons.title: Introduction to developing AI agents
lessons.content_md:
Explore what AI agents are, understand their core components, and discover a range of impactful use cases driving AI-powered transformation.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-develop-ai-agents/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to Microsoft AI agent solutions
lessons.content_md:
Explore Microsoft AI agent solutions and gain clarity on when to adopt, extend, or develop custom agent solutions based on your scenario and objectives.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-microsoft-ai-agent-solutions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to Microsoft AI agent solutions

lessons.title: Choose the best Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility path for your scenario
lessons.content_md:
Explore development options for extending Microsoft 365 Copilot with custom data, logic, and actions. Determine the best approach for your scenario.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/choose-microsoft-365-copilot-extensibility-path/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Choose the best Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility path for your scenario

lessons.title: Choose a custom AI agent development path
lessons.content_md:
Explore development paths for building custom AI agents for internal use or commercial applications. Compare tools and services like Copilot Studio, Microsoft Foundry, Microsoft 365 Agents SDK, and the Microsoft Teams SDK.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/choose-ai-agent-development-path/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Choose a custom AI agent development path

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build a foundation to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build a foundation to build AI agents and extend Microsoft 365 Copilot**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
